metadata.description: On ClickUp, create a new workspace, then create a project named "Benchmark Development" with at least one custom field added to the project.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On ClickUp, create a new workspace, then create a project named "Benchmark Development" with at least one custom field added to the project.
